history.en: Designer crossbreed developed in the late 20th/early 21st century by crossing Boston Terrier and Pug to create a compact companion dog combining the friendly alertness of the Boston Terrier with the charming affectionate personality of the Pug
history.zh: 20世纪末21世纪初设计的杂交犬种，通过波士顿梗与巴哥犬杂交培育出紧凑型伴侣犬，兼具波士顿梗的友善机敏与巴哥犬的迷人亲和。

overview.en: The Bugg is a designer crossbreed between the Boston Terrier and the Pug, originating in the United States. This mixed breed combines the friendly, alert nature of the Boston Terrier with the charming, affectionate personality of the Pug, resulting in a compact, playful, and intelligent companion. Buggs are known for their loving disposition, making them excellent family dogs. They are alert and curious, often retaining a puppy-like energy well into adulthood. Their small size and adaptable temperament allow them to thrive in various living situations. While they are generally friendly with strangers and other animals, early socialization is key to ensuring a well-rounded adult dog. Buggs may inherit the brachycephalic (flat-faced) features of the Pug, which can affect breathing and heat tolerance. Overall, the Bugg is a delightful, low-shedding (with proper care) and devoted pet that brings joy and companionship to any household.
overview.zh: 巴哥犬是波士顿梗和巴哥犬的杂交设计犬种，起源于美国。这种混种犬结合了波士顿梗友好、机警的天性和巴哥犬迷人、深情的个性，形成了一种体型紧凑、活泼且聪明的伴侣犬。巴哥犬以充满爱心的性格著称，是优秀的家庭犬。它们机警好奇，通常成年后仍保持幼犬般的活力。体型小巧且适应性强，使它们能在各种生活环境中茁壮成长。虽然通常对陌生人和动物友好，但早期社会化是确保成年犬性格全面的关键。巴哥犬可能继承巴哥犬的扁脸特征，这会影响呼吸和耐热能力。总的来说，巴哥犬是一种令人愉悦、掉毛少（适当护理下）且忠诚的宠物，为家庭带来欢乐和陪伴。

care.en: Daily care for a Bugg includes moderate exercise of 20-30 minutes, such as brisk walks or play sessions, to maintain a healthy weight and prevent obesity. Due to their brachycephalic nature, avoid strenuous activity in hot or humid weather to prevent breathing difficulties. Grooming needs are moderate: brush their short coat weekly to minimize shedding, clean facial wrinkles daily to prevent infections, and trim nails regularly. Bathe only when necessary using a gentle dog shampoo. Dental hygiene is crucial—brush teeth several times a week. Schedule annual veterinary check-ups, and monitor for common issues like cherry eye, skin allergies, and respiratory problems. Keep vaccinations and flea/tick prevention up to date. Buggs are prone to overheating, so always provide fresh water and a cool environment. Early socialization and positive exposure to various experiences help develop a confident adult dog.
care.zh: 巴哥犬的日常护理包括每天20-30分钟的适度运动，如快走或游戏，以保持健康体重并防止肥胖。由于扁脸特征，避免在炎热或潮湿天气进行剧烈活动，以防呼吸困难。梳理需求适中：每周梳理短毛一次以减少掉毛，每天清洁面部褶皱以防感染，并定期修剪指甲。仅在必要时使用温和的狗用洗发水洗澡。牙齿卫生至关重要——每周刷牙数次。安排年度兽医检查，并监测常见问题如樱桃眼、皮肤过敏和呼吸问题。保持疫苗接种和跳蚤/蜱虫预防措施最新。巴哥犬容易过热，因此始终提供新鲜饮水和凉爽环境。早期社会化和积极接触各种经历有助于培养自信的成年犬。

training.en: Training a Bugg requires patience and positive reinforcement, as they are intelligent but can be stubborn. Use treats, praise, and play to motivate them. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain their attention. Start with basic commands like sit, stay, and come, and incorporate crate training for a safe den. Early socialization is vital—expose your Bugg to different people, animals, and environments from a young age to prevent fearfulness. Consistency is key; use the same cues and rewards to avoid confusion. Avoid harsh corrections, as Buggs are sensitive and may shut down. They respond well to clicker training and puzzle toys that challenge their mind. Housebreaking may require patience due to their small bladder; use a consistent schedule and reward successes. With gentle, consistent guidance, Buggs become well-mannered companions.
training.zh: 训练巴哥犬需要耐心和积极强化，因为它们聪明但可能固执。使用零食、表扬和游戏来激励它们。保持训练时间短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持注意力。从基本命令如坐、停、来开始，并加入笼内训练以提供安全空间。早期社会化至关重要——从小让巴哥犬接触不同的人、动物和环境，以防止恐惧。一致性是关键；使用相同的指令和奖励以避免混淆。避免严厉的纠正，因为巴哥犬敏感，可能会退缩。它们对响片训练和挑战智力的益智玩具反应良好。家庭训练可能需要耐心，因为膀胱小；使用固定的时间表并奖励成功。通过温和、一致的指导，巴哥犬会成为举止得体的伴侣。

diet.en: Feed your Bugg a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. Since Buggs are prone to obesity, measure meals and limit treats to 10% of daily calories. Choose a dog food with real meat as the first ingredient and avoid fillers like corn or soy. Split daily portions into two meals to reduce bloat risk and maintain energy. Puppies require three to four small meals per day. Monitor their weight and adjust portions as needed. Due to potential brachycephalic breathing issues, avoid bowls that force them to eat too quickly; consider slow-feeders or elevated bowls. Always provide fresh water. Some Buggs may have food allergies; if you notice skin or digestive issues, consult your vet for an elimination diet. Supplements like omega-3 fatty acids can support skin and coat health, but only after veterinary approval.
diet.zh: 为巴哥犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。由于巴哥犬易肥胖，需测量食物分量，并将零食限制在每日热量的10%以内。选择以真实肉类为首要成分的狗粮，避免玉米或大豆等填充物。将每日份量分成两餐，以减少腹胀风险并维持能量。幼犬需要每天三到四顿小餐。监测体重并根据需要调整分量。由于可能的扁脸呼吸问题，避免使用迫使其快速进食的碗；考虑使用慢食碗或升高碗。始终提供新鲜饮用水。部分巴哥犬可能有食物过敏；如果出现皮肤或消化问题，请咨询兽医进行排除饮食法。补充剂如欧米伽-3脂肪酸可支持皮肤和毛发健康，但需在兽医批准后使用。

livingTips.en: Buggs are adaptable and thrive in apartments or houses with yards, as long as they get daily exercise. They are indoor dogs and should not live outside due to temperature sensitivity. Their small size makes them suitable for city living, but be mindful of heat—avoid walks during peak sun and provide cooling mats. Buggs are generally good with children and other pets, especially if raised together, but supervise interactions with very young kids to prevent accidental injury. They can be alert barkers, so early training to curb excessive noise is helpful. Provide a cozy bed, toys for mental stimulation, and a safe space to retreat. Due to their brachycephalic nature, avoid collars that put pressure on the neck; use a harness instead. With proper care, Buggs make wonderful companions for singles, couples, and families alike.
livingTips.zh: 巴哥犬适应性强，只要每天得到锻炼，在公寓或带院子的房子里都能茁壮成长。它们是室内犬，因对温度敏感，不应生活在户外。体型小巧适合城市生活，但要注意高温——避免在日照强烈时散步，并提供冷却垫。巴哥犬通常对孩子和其他宠物友好，尤其是一起长大的，但需监督与非常年幼孩子的互动以防意外伤害。它们可能警觉吠叫，因此早期训练以控制过度噪音很有帮助。提供舒适的床、益智玩具和安全的休息空间。由于扁脸特征，避免使用压迫颈部的项圈；改用背带。通过适当护理，巴哥犬是单身、情侣和家庭的绝佳伴侣。
